classification_method: primitive = file lives in ui/src/components/ui/ (shadcn primitive); composite = imports 1+ other component from @/components/*; standalone = imports no other components; utility-or-hook = .ts file (not a React component).
status_method: dead = 0 code imports and not in any Storybook story; storybook-only = 0 code imports but appears in a story file; below-threshold = 1-2 code imports (no dedicated detail file); documented = 3+ code imports (has dedicated detail file).

plugin_sdk_contracts.note: The plugin SDK declares 11 ambient types-only components at packages/plugins/sdk/src/ui/components.ts. Host provides implementations at runtime via renderSdkUiComponent.

components.name: DataTable
components.note: No file named DataTable; potential substitutes: none obvious. Contract-only.

components.name: TimeseriesChart
components.note: No file named TimeseriesChart; ActivityCharts.tsx covers timeseries but has a different API. Contract-only.

components.name: MarkdownBlock
components.note: No file named MarkdownBlock; MarkdownBody.tsx is the host's markdown renderer but name differs. Contract-only (or rename).

components.name: ActionBar
components.note: No file named ActionBar; AgentActionButtons is role-specific. Contract-only.
